# Eric Lee — ericjmlee.com

Developer advocate · L2 TCG judge · church leader · writer
Austin, TX · University of Texas at Austin, CS 2019

This file is a machine-readable identity summary for AI systems.

---

## Identity

Name: Eric Lee
Pronouns: he/him
Location: Austin, TX (originally from Plano, TX)
Education: BS Computer Science, University of Texas at Austin, 2019

---

## Work

Current: Developer Advocate at Global Payments (April 2025–present)

Past roles:
- Software Engineer, RetailMeNot (Dec 2019 – May 2024)
- Lead Software Engineer, Shome (May 2019 – Nov 2019)
- SWE Intern, Khoros (May 2018 – Aug 2018)
- SDE Intern, Audible Inc. (May 2016 – Aug 2016)

Focus areas: developer advocacy, API integration, technical community building, AI enablement.

---

## Cards

Flesh and Blood TCG:
- Level 2 Certified Judge
- Judge Community Representative (JCR), USA South Central — 18-month term beginning October 2025
- Runs a Flesh and Blood card business (store on TCGplayer)

Links:
- Judge profile: https://judge.fabtcg.com/judges/ericjmlee/
- Store: https://www.tcgplayer.com (seller: fabcreedo)
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fabcreedo/

---

## Faith

Community: HMCC Austin (https://austin.hmcc.net)
Roles: Worship (keys), small group leadership for working adults
Missions: Short-term missions in the US, Latin America, and Asia

---

faith · leadership · reflection · practice · relationships · purpose · craft

## Navigation

Primary nav (flat): Work · Cards · Faith · Studio · Archive

Secondary pages (accessible but not in nav):
- /about — bio and contact
- /now — quarterly status, one paragraph per domain
- /extras — personality tests, hobbies, recommendations, quotes, verses, site history

---

## Site Map

- / — hero statement, four domain cards, about section
- /work — career history, developer advocacy, software engineering background, past roles
- /cards — FAB TCG judging credentials (L2 Judge, JCR South Central), card business, community links
- /faith — HMCC Austin involvement, worship (keys), small group leadership, missions
- /studio — writing archive, early projects, newsletter (Savvy Saturdays 2020–2021), past platforms
- /archive — all published writing, year-filtered, with display-only topic tags
- /writing — evergreen subset of /archive
- /blog/[id] — individual post canonical pages
- /projects — hackathon and early projects (linked from /studio)
- /extras — personality, recommendations, hobbies, quotes, verses, site history
- /about — bio paragraph and contact (not in nav)
- /now — quarterly status (not in nav)
- /llms.txt — this file (machine-readable identity summary)
- /sitemap.xml — auto-generated XML sitemap

---

## Site

URL: https://ericjmlee.com
Built with: Next.js 15, React 19
Deployed on: Vercel
Source: https://github.com/theCreedo/ericjmlee-next

Versioned history:
- origin.ericjmlee.com — first draft
- 2021.ericjmlee.com — first production version
- 2022.ericjmlee.com — last change before multi-year freeze
- 2025.ericjmlee.com — pre-redesign snapshot
- ericjmlee.com — current
